name: Sodium butyrate
summary: Oral salt form of the microbiota-derived short-chain fatty acid butyrate, tested in early human metabolic trials and broader gut-metabolite biology.
mechanism_summary: Attempts to restore or augment butyrate signaling directly, with proposed effects on host metabolism, intestinal and hepatic handling of short-chain fatty acids, inflammation, triglycerides, glucose control, and body composition.

open_questions: Whether oral butyrate can produce durable aging-relevant benefit rather than short-term metabolic changes
Whether serum butyrate increases translate to tissue target engagement in older adults
Which populations respond, given different signals in obesity with versus without type 2 diabetes
